title: Julie Resetarits
content:
People.ContactEmail jresetarits@mtiplus.ca
Julie Resetarits is a partner in our Labour & Employment Group in Montréal. Her practice focuses exclusively on immigration law. She possesses a sound expertise in corporate immigration matters throughout Canada.
She is recognized for her professionalism, broad expertise and ability to respond to the changing and growing needs of Canadian companies and multinational corporations. Ms. Resetarits has gained over 20 years of experience in the field of professional mobility, work permits and global immigration. She advises primarily SMEs and multinational companies based in Canada and internationally. She is a strategic adviser to enterprises on all matters pertaining to immigration during mergers and acquisitions or any other major transaction. She also counsels individuals and their families through various stages of their establishment in Canada, either on a temporary or a permanent basis.
Ms. Resetarits has practiced with private firms as well as with the economic development agency Montréal International where she provided training sessions pertaining to work permits and permanent residence to corporations, international organizations and their employees.
Ms. Resetarits completed her law studies at Université Laval. She was called to the Québec Bar in 1996.
She is a member of l’Association québécoise des avocats et avocates en droit de l’immigration (AQAADI) and the Canadian Bar Association (CBA).
She was a speaker for l’Association de planification fiscale et financière (APFF) and presented the course: Émigration et immigration des particuliers/Éléments périphériques in 2007-2008-2009-2010 and 2011.
